description: The Elastic model provides a linear representation of joint stiffness (normal and shear). There is no yield. Elastic joints are infinitely strong.

property_groups.name: Properties
property_groups.description: Joint properties for the 'elastic' joint constitutive model. Assign the model with 'block contact jmodel assign elastic [range ...]', then set these with 'block contact property <keyword> <value> [range jmodel elastic]'.

note: Elastic joints have no yield (infinitely strong); the only properties are the normal and shear stiffnesses.
usage: block contact jmodel assign elastic ; block contact property <prop> <value> [range jmodel elastic]
